name: Christine Blake
description: Originally from Russia. She has a lively and frank personality, allowing her to get along with anyone. She acts as a gun specialist, who can use any type of gun. She is also a heavy drinker and optimist. ~!Christine is not her real name, she changed her face and identity after defecting from Russian intelligence.!~

name: Cooler
description: Cooler is the main villain in the fifth and sixth movies of the anime _Dragon Ball Z_, introduced as the older brother of Freeza, and the oldest son of King Cold. He was designed by Akira Toriyama, the original manga author. Like his brother, Cooler can push his body through transformations to increase his power. Although only two forms are seen, it is stated that Cooler possesses the same number of forms Freeza does, as well as a fifth and more powerful form. He first travels to Earth in _Coole

name: Eva-Beatrice
nativeName: エヴァ・ベアトリーチェ
description: ~!A witch who resides within Eva's heart. She represents all of Eva's dark desires from her childhood, including her greed for the Ushiromiya family inheritance; as such, she has the appearance of Eva as a young girl. She first appears in Banquet of the Golden Witch, where she helps Eva solve the riddle of Beatrice's epitaph, leading to her discovery of Kinzo's hidden gold and her inheritance of the Ushiromiya family. name: Fei Rune
description: Fei Rune helps [Tenma Matsukaze](https://anilist.co/character/41766/Tenma-Matsukaze) and Raimon stop Protocol Omega from erasing the future of soccer by assembling the strongest team in history. He comes from 200 years in the future, and travels across time with his companion [Wonderbot](https://anilist.co/character/67401/Clark-Wonderbot) using the Inazuma Caravan. He plays for Raimon as a Midfielder and is key asset in their success.

description: Hendricksen is one of the current Great Holy Knights, thus also making him one of the two people who have command over the entirety of Britannia after the coup d'état. name: Himari Uehara
description: __Height:__ 155 cm (5'1") Himari is a first-year student at Haneoka Girls' High School and is the leader and bassist of Afterglow. She is a huge fan of Kaoru. Himari is cheerful, good-natured, and is the band coordinator. She struggles to read the mood of a situation, which means she sometimes does things that have no effect. name: Hiroshi Kido
description: Hiroshi Kido is the son of the village chief and a 3rd-year high school student who lives in the Goto Islands. Mediocre in all his undertakings, his report card boasts of straight 3's. He was inspired to work harder after witnessing the efforts of Handa-sensei. He is currently working hard to get to the culinary school outside the island.

Hitomi is a short girl that shares the same big beady eyes as her older brother and make similar expressions. She wears her medium length hair in two short twin-tails. name: Keito Hasumi
description: __Unit:__ AKATSUKI __Club:__ Archery Club __Circles:__ Dramatica, Keito Lecture, Manga Club As the son of a buddhist priest, he tends to drone on when giving lectures. While he may seem overly serious, and perhaps a bit moody, he becomes slightly vulnerable when unexpected incidents occur. He carries out captivating performances with the flow of his mellow singing voice. At first he appears quiet and almost shy, even having been described as a “quiet glasses guy” by fellow AKATSUKI member Kuro.

He lived with his brother Shiro and his grandfather Juuzo, after his parents were apparently killed in a lab accident caused by his grandfather. One day, Koji receives a call from his grandfather to meet him at his mountain cabin. Just as Kouji arrives however, the cabin explodes. name: Mako Kawai
description: A first-year student who joins the Food Culture Research Club and enables its approval by being their fourth member. Nicknamed "Makocchi" (まこっち) by childhood friend Shinon (and later Tsutsuji), she works night shifts at an inarizushi bar. Her cooking expertise comes from past experience in her childhood, as well as being a regular viewer of Mokotaro's channel. She helps her club stay within its remit by conducting most of the cooking under the club's name.

name: Medusa
description: A gorgon from Hell who is close friends with Jashin, despite the later seeing her more as a walking cash machine. She and Jashin are pretty close, to such a level that their relationship leaves Yurine a feel of a "boy-girl relationship", with Jashin often behaving like an immoral husband who constantly manipulates her "wife" Medusa for the sake of monetary gain. name: Mineru Wachi
description: Mineru is a fourth year student who lives in the Seikan's "Goddess Dormitory." Mineru is a researcher who loves working with toxic gas, but due to that she often fails her experiments.

name: Misumi Ikaruga
description: He's an actor of the Summer Troupe. One day, he settled down in one of the Mankai Company's dorms without permission and lived in a room for some days without getting noticed. He is hard to make sense of and always enthusiastic and full of energy. Misumi also constantly thinks about triangles and collects everything in a triangle shape. His physical abilities are really high, so much so that he can even run around the dorm walls and ceilings.
